params.name: Infin. Improb. Eng.
params.description: The Infinite Improbability Engine is the driving core of a spaceship in the Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy, creating an improbability field that harnesses power from the impossibility of things, turning events that normally couldn't happen into possibilities. It enables the ship to perform seemingly impossible spatial jumps, instantly transferring individuals ejected from the ship to another, thereby circumventing the traditional limitations of space travel.
